form.formComment: Flew the lids with a quick early split but had to settle for the minor money when third (30.87) over 525m at Taree Super Track. With a good start can take advantage of the low draw.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Flew the lids with a quick early split but had to settle for the minor money when third (30.87) over 525m at Taree Super Track. With a good start can take advantage of the low draw.

form.formComment: A brilliant 19.75 for the 366m trip. Should be in this for a long way.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: A brilliant 19.75 for the 366m trip. Should be in this for a long way.

form.formComment: Was among the placegetters latest at this track when a 3.5 lengths third but did clock a useful 19.84 over the 366m journey. Should be in this for a long way.

formComments.comment: Was among the placegetters latest at this track when a 3.5 lengths third but did clock a useful 19.84 over the 366m journey. Should be in this for a long way.

form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (31.53) when eighth over 525m at Taree Super Track in a NG. Still a maiden from the draw but has placed two times. Among the main chances.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Missed the frame latest (31.53) when eighth over 525m at Taree Super Track in a NG. Still a maiden from the draw but has placed two times. Among the main chances.

form.formComment: Good effort to win last start by 3.5 lengths over 366m at this track in a handy (19.60), beating Alston. Will find this a bit tougher, not likely to feature on this occasion.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Good effort to win last start by 3.5 lengths over 366m at this track in a handy (19.60), beating Alston. Will find this a bit tougher, not likely to feature on this occasion.

form.formComment: Was edged out last time at this track when beaten just a neck but did clock a speedy 19.77 over the 366m journey. Place prospects appear best again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Was edged out last time at this track when beaten just a neck but did clock a speedy 19.77 over the 366m journey. Place prospects appear best again.

form.formComment: In fine form with wins at his last couple of outings when well in the market at this track. No advantage from the wide draw. Hard to have this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In fine form with wins at his last couple of outings when well in the market at this track. No advantage from the wide draw. Hard to have this time.

form.formComment: Finished in the minors last time in a Grade 5 at this track when a 3.5 lengths second but did run a slick 19.83 over the 366m trip. Expected to go close with a repeat of latest.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Finished in the minors last time in a Grade 5 at this track when a 3.5 lengths second but did run a slick 19.83 over the 366m trip. Expected to go close with a repeat of latest.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Shifted out and bumped on numerous occasions leaving the 200m.

form.formComment: Last start finished 3rd over 350m at Q Straight beaten 5.5 lengths (19.20) behind Special Rocky in a Grade 5 on April 1. Speedy conveyance who looks hard to beat.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Finished fifth (20.16) last start at this track. Prior to that had recorded three minor placings in a row. Looks tested this line up.
